title: Ender's Insanity [Dalek Mod]
description: A Doctor Who modpack centered around the Dalek Mod. And enhancing its experience
body:
Ender's Insanity is a series of modpacks where i make a pack centered around a certain mod

# Main Mod: Dalek Mod
One of the most well known and feature rich Doctor Who mods out there. This one in particular triggers a lot of nostalgia for me.

Some cool tech mods

_I'm doing this for fun, support will likely be minimal._
